root.label: PublicationDelivery
root.description: Rotelementet i alle NeTEx-filer for den britiske profilen (UK Profile). Inneholder metadata (tidsstempel, deltaker) og selve dataene i én CompositeFrame. Brukes for takstdata i England i henhold til Bus Open Data Service (BODS).

children.label: CompositeFrame
children.description: Samler alle delrammer for ett datasett. I den britiske profilen inneholder CompositeFrame flere FareFrame og andre spesialiserte frames. TypeOfFrameRef angir profiltype (f.eks. UK_PI_LINE_FARE_OFFER eller UK_PI_NETWORK_FARE_OFFER).
children.xmlSnippet:
<CompositeFrame version="1.0"
               id="UK:COMP:CompositeFrame:1:LOC">
  <ValidBetween>
    <FromDate>2024-01-01T00:00:00</FromDate>
    <ToDate>2025-12-31T23:59:59</ToDate>
  </ValidBetween>
  <Name>Bus Fares Example</Name>
  <TypeOfFrameRef ref="fxc:UK:DFT:TypeOfFrame_UK_PI_LINE_FARE_OFFER:FXCP"
    version="fxc:v1.0"/>
  <frames>
    <!-- ResourceFrame (valgfri) -->
    <!-- ServiceFrame (anbefalt) -->
    <!-- FareFrame (påkrevd for takst) -->
    <!-- SalesTransactionFrame (valgfri) -->
  </frames>
</CompositeFrame>

children.label: ResourceFrame
children.description: Felles ramme for organisasjoner, datakilder og andre ressurser. Inneholder operatører (Operator), autoriteter (Authority) og typedefinisjoner. Valgfri, men anbefalt for delte ressurser.
children.xmlSnippet:
<ResourceFrame version="1.0"
              id="UK:RES:ResourceFrame:1:LOC">
  <TypeOfFrameRef ref="fxc:UK:DFT:TypeOfFrame_UK_PI_COMMON:FXCP"/>
  <organisations>
    <!-- Operator, Authority -->
  </organisations>
  <typesOfValue>
    <!-- TypeOfFareProduct, TypeOfTravelDocument -->
  </typesOfValue>
</ResourceFrame>

children.label: FareFrame
children.description: Hovedrammen for takstdata i den britiske profilen. Organisert rundt Tariff-objekter som inneholder hele takststrukturen: soner, takstelementer, produkter, salgstilbud og pristabeller. TypeOfFrameRef angir om det er linje-takst (LINE_FARE) eller nettverkstakst (NETWORK_FARE).
children.xmlSnippet:
<FareFrame version="1.0"
           id="UK:FARE:FareFrame:1:LOC">
  <Name>Fares for Line 1</Name>
  <TypeOfFrameRef ref="fxc:UK:DFT:TypeOfFrame_UK_PI_FARE_PRODUCT:FXCP"
    versionRef="fxc:v1.0"/>
  <!-- Soner og stoppesteder: -->
  <fareZones>
    <!-- TariffZone / FareZone -->
  </fareZones>
  <!-- Takststrukturer: -->
  <tariffs>
    <!-- Tariff -->
  </tariffs>
  <!-- Produkter: -->
  <fareProducts>
    <!-- PreassignedFareProduct, AmountOfPriceUnitProduct -->
  </fareProducts>
  <!-- Salgstilbud: -->
  <salesOfferPackages>
    <!-- SalesOfferPackage -->
  </salesOfferPackages>
  <!-- Pristabeller: -->
  <fareTables>
    <!-- FareTable -->
  </fareTables>
  <!-- Prisgrupper (valgfri, for band-prising): -->
  <priceGroups>
    <!-- PriceGroup -->
  </priceGroups>
</FareFrame>

children.label: fareZones
children.description: Liste over takst-soner. Kan være TariffZone (generisk) eller FareZone (spesialisert for takst). Brukes for sonebaserte tariffer.
children.xmlSnippet:
<fareZones>
  <TariffZone version="1.0" id="UK:TZ:Zone1:LOC">
    <Name>Zone 1 - City Centre</Name>
  </TariffZone>
  <!-- Eller FareZone med medlemmer: -->
  <FareZone version="1.0" id="UK:FZ:Crawley:LOC">
    <Name>Crawley Area</Name>
    <members>
      <ScheduledStopPointRef ref="UK:SSP:Stop001:LOC"/>
    </members>
  </FareZone>
</fareZones>

children.label: TariffZone
children.description: Generisk takst-sone. Definerer et geografisk område for takstberegning. Kan refereres av DistanceMatrixElement eller brukes i zonale pass-produkter.
children.xmlSnippet:
<TariffZone version="1.0" id="UK:TZ:Zone1:LOC">
  <Name>Zone 1 - City Centre</Name>
  <ShortName>Z1</ShortName>
</TariffZone>

children.label: FareZone
children.description: Spesialisert takst-sone med medlemmer (stoppesteder). Kan inneholde liste over ScheduledStopPoint som tilhører sonen. Brukes når man trenger eksplisitt kobling mellom sone og stoppesteder.
children.xmlSnippet:
<FareZone version="1.0" id="UK:FZ:Crawley:LOC">
  <Name>Crawley Area</Name>
  <members>
    <ScheduledStopPointRef ref="UK:SSP:Stop001:LOC"/>
    <ScheduledStopPointRef ref="UK:SSP:Stop002:LOC"/>
  </members>
</FareZone>

children.label: tariffs
children.description: Liste over Tariff-objekter. Hvert Tariff representerer en komplett takststruktur for et produkt eller produktfamilie (f.eks. enkeltbilletter for en linje, eller ukeskort for et område). Dette er kjernen i UK-profilen — alle takstelementer, intervaller og geografiske strukturer er organisert under Tariff.
children.xmlSnippet:
<tariffs>
  <Tariff version="1.0" id="UK:TAR:Single_Line1:LOC">
    <Name>Single Fares - Line 1</Name>
    <OperatorRef ref="noc:METR"/>
    <LineRef ref="UK:LINE:1:LOC"/>
    <!-- FareStructureElements, TimeIntervals, GeographicalIntervals -->
  </Tariff>
</tariffs>

children.label: Tariff
children.description: Takststruktur — definerer komplett takst for et produkt eller produktfamilie. Inneholder OperatorRef, valgfri LineRef (for linjebaserte takster), og samlinger av FareStructureElement, TimeInterval, GeographicalInterval og QualityStructureFactor. Tariff er den sentrale organiserende enheten i UK-profilen.
children.xmlSnippet:
<Tariff version="1.0" id="UK:TAR:Single_Line1:LOC">
  <validityConditions>
    <ValidBetween>
      <FromDate>2024-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
      <ToDate>2024-12-31T23:59:59Z</ToDate>
    </ValidBetween>
  </validityConditions>
  <Name>Single Fares - Line 1</Name>
  <Description>Point-to-point single fares</Description>
  <OperatorRef version="1.0" ref="noc:METR"/>
  <LineRef version="1.0" ref="UK:LINE:1:LOC"/>
  <!-- Takstelementer: -->
  <fareStructureElements>
    <!-- FareStructureElement -->
  </fareStructureElements>
  <!-- Tidsintervaller (for pass): -->
  <timeIntervals>
    <!-- TimeInterval -->
  </timeIntervals>
  <!-- Geografiske intervaller (for prisband): -->
  <geographicalIntervals>
    <!-- GeographicalInterval -->
  </geographicalIntervals>
  <!-- Kvalitetsfaktorer (for carnet): -->
  <qualityStructureFactors>
    <!-- QualityStructureFactor -->
  </qualityStructureFactors>
</Tariff>

children.label: fareStructureElements
children.description: Takststrukturelementer innenfor denne tariffen. UK-profilen bruker TypeOfFareStructureElement for å kategorisere: 'access' (geografisk/OD), 'eligibility' (brukerprofil), 'durations' (tidsperioder) osv. Hvert element kan inneholde distanceMatrixElements, validityParameterAssignments eller andre spesifikasjoner.
children.xmlSnippet:
<fareStructureElements>
  <!-- Access element (geografisk): -->
  <FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="UK:FSE:Access:LOC">
    <Name>O/D pairs for Line 1</Name>
    <TypeOfFareStructureElementRef version="fxc:v1.0"
      ref="fxc:access"/>
    <distanceMatrixElements>
      <!-- DistanceMatrixElement -->
    </distanceMatrixElements>
  </FareStructureElement>
  <!-- Eligibility element (brukerprofil): -->
  <FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="UK:FSE:Eligibility:LOC">
    <Name>User types</Name>
    <TypeOfFareStructureElementRef version="fxc:v1.0"
      ref="fxc:eligibility"/>
    <validityParameterAssignments>
      <!-- GenericParameterAssignment med UserProfile -->
    </validityParameterAssignments>
  </FareStructureElement>
</fareStructureElements>

children.label: FareStructureElement
children.description: Takststrukturelement — definerer én dimensjon av taksten. TypeOfFareStructureElementRef angir type: 'access' (geografisk tilgang/OD-par), 'eligibility' (brukerprofil/rabattkrav), 'durations' (tidsperioder for pass), 'conditions' (spesielle betingelser). Kan inneholde distanceMatrixElements (for OD), validityParameterAssignments (for bruksregler), timeIntervals (referanser) eller qualityStructureFactors.
children.xmlSnippet:
<!-- Access element med OD-par: -->
<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="UK:FSE:Access:LOC">
  <Name>O/D pairs for Line 1</Name>
  <TypeOfFareStructureElementRef version="fxc:v1.0"
    ref="fxc:access"/>
  <distanceMatrixElements>
    <DistanceMatrixElement version="1.0" id="UK:DME:A_to_B:LOC">
      <StartTariffZoneRef ref="UK:TZ:ZoneA:LOC"/>
      <EndTariffZoneRef ref="UK:TZ:ZoneB:LOC"/>
      <priceGroups>
        <PriceGroupRef ref="UK:PG:Band1:LOC"/>
      </priceGroups>
    </DistanceMatrixElement>
  </distanceMatrixElements>
</FareStructureElement>

<!-- Eligibility element med brukerprofiler: -->
<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="UK:FSE:Eligibility:LOC">
  <Name>User types</Name>
  <TypeOfFareStructureElementRef version="fxc:v1.0"
    ref="fxc:eligibility"/>
  <validityParameterAssignments>
    <GenericParameterAssignment version="1.0"
      id="UK:GPA:Adult:LOC" order="1">
      <limitations>
        <UserProfile version="1.0" id="UK:UP:Adult:LOC">
          <Name>Adult</Name>
          <UserType>adult</UserType>
          <MinimumAge>16</MinimumAge>
        </UserProfile>
      </limitations>
    </GenericParameterAssignment>
  </validityParameterAssignments>
</FareStructureElement>

children.label: distanceMatrixElements
children.description: OD-elementer (Origin-Destination) — liste over relasjoner mellom soner eller stoppesteder. Brukes i 'access' FareStructureElement. Hvert element kan referere til en PriceGroup som inneholder prisband.
children.xmlSnippet:
<distanceMatrixElements>
  <DistanceMatrixElement version="1.0" id="UK:DME:A_to_B:LOC">
    <priceGroups>
      <PriceGroupRef ref="UK:PG:Band1:LOC"/>
    </priceGroups>
    <StartTariffZoneRef ref="UK:TZ:ZoneA:LOC"/>
    <EndTariffZoneRef ref="UK:TZ:ZoneB:LOC"/>
  </DistanceMatrixElement>
</distanceMatrixElements>

children.label: DistanceMatrixElement
children.description: OD-element — definerer en relasjon mellom to punkter (sone-til-sone eller stopp-til-stopp). StartTariffZoneRef og EndTariffZoneRef angir start og slutt. PriceGroupRef peker til prisband (GeographicalIntervalPrice). UK-profilen bruker ofte priceGroups i stedet for direkte priser i DistanceMatrixElement.
children.xmlSnippet:
<DistanceMatrixElement version="1.0" id="UK:DME:ZoneA_to_ZoneB:LOC">
  <!-- Prisband (referanse til PriceGroup med GeographicalIntervalPrice): -->
  <priceGroups>
    <PriceGroupRef ref="UK:PG:Band1:LOC"/>
  </priceGroups>
  <!-- Fra-sone: -->
  <StartTariffZoneRef ref="UK:TZ:ZoneA:LOC"/>
  <!-- Til-sone: -->
  <EndTariffZoneRef ref="UK:TZ:ZoneB:LOC"/>
  <!-- Eller stopp-til-stopp: -->
  <!-- <StartStopPointRef ref="UK:SSP:Stop001:LOC"/> -->
  <!-- <EndStopPointRef ref="UK:SSP:Stop002:LOC"/> -->
</DistanceMatrixElement>

children.label: validityParameterAssignments
children.description: Bruksparametere — brukes i 'eligibility' eller 'conditions' FareStructureElement. Inneholder GenericParameterAssignment med limitations som UserProfile, CompanionProfile, RoundTrip, FrequencyOfUse, Interchanging, etc.
children.xmlSnippet:
<validityParameterAssignments>
  <GenericParameterAssignment version="1.0"
    id="UK:GPA:Adult:LOC" order="1">
    <limitations>
      <UserProfile version="1.0" id="UK:UP:Adult:LOC">
        <Name>Adult</Name>
        <UserType>adult</UserType>
        <MinimumAge>16</MinimumAge>
      </UserProfile>
    </limitations>
  </GenericParameterAssignment>
</validityParameterAssignments>

children.label: GenericParameterAssignment
children.description: Parametertildeling — kobler bruksparametere til takststrukturen. Limitations kan inneholde UserProfile, CompanionProfile (gruppebillett), RoundTrip, FrequencyOfUse, Interchanging, UsageValidityPeriod osv.
children.xmlSnippet:
<GenericParameterAssignment version="1.0"
  id="UK:GPA:Adult:LOC" order="1">
  <limitations>
    <!-- UserProfile for voksen: -->
    <UserProfile version="1.0" id="UK:UP:Adult:LOC">
      <Name>Adult</Name>
      <UserType>adult</UserType>
      <MinimumAge>16</MinimumAge>
    </UserProfile>
  </limitations>
</GenericParameterAssignment>

<!-- Gruppebillett: -->
<GenericParameterAssignment version="1.0"
  id="UK:GPA:Family:LOC" order="2">
  <limitations>
    <CompanionProfile version="1.0" id="UK:CP:Family:LOC">
      <Name>Family Ticket</Name>
      <MinimumNumberOfPersons>2</MinimumNumberOfPersons>
      <MaximumNumberOfPersons>5</MaximumNumberOfPersons>
    </CompanionProfile>
  </limitations>
</GenericParameterAssignment>

children.label: timeIntervals
children.description: Tidsintervaller for pass-produkter. Definerer gyldighetsperioder som dag, uke, måned osv. Brukes i 'durations' FareStructureElement.
children.xmlSnippet:
<timeIntervals>
  <TimeInterval version="1.0" id="UK:TI:Day:LOC">
    <Name>1 Day</Name>
    <Description>Valid for one calendar day</Description>
    <Duration>P1D</Duration>
  </TimeInterval>
  <TimeInterval version="1.0" id="UK:TI:Week:LOC">
    <Name>7 Days</Name>
    <Duration>P7D</Duration>
  </TimeInterval>
</timeIntervals>

children.label: TimeInterval
children.description: Tidsintervall — definerer en gyldighetsperiode for pass-produkter. Duration angis som ISO 8601 (P1D = 1 dag, P7D = 7 dager, P1M = 1 måned). Refereres av FareStructureElement (durations) eller PreassignedFareProduct.
children.xmlSnippet:
<TimeInterval version="1.0" id="UK:TI:Week:LOC">
  <Name>7 Days</Name>
  <Description>Valid for 7 consecutive days</Description>
  <Duration>P7D</Duration>
</TimeInterval>

children.label: geographicalIntervals
children.description: Geografiske intervaller (prisband) — brukes for å gruppere OD-relasjoner med samme pris. Refereres av DistanceMatrixElement via PriceGroup. UK-profilen bruker GeographicalInterval for å definere prisband (f.eks. Band A = £1.60, Band B = £2.40).
children.xmlSnippet:
<geographicalIntervals>
  <GeographicalInterval version="1.0" id="UK:GI:BandA:LOC">
    <Name>Price Band A</Name>
    <NumberOfUnits>1</NumberOfUnits>
  </GeographicalInterval>
  <GeographicalInterval version="1.0" id="UK:GI:BandB:LOC">
    <Name>Price Band B</Name>
    <NumberOfUnits>2</NumberOfUnits>
  </GeographicalInterval>
</geographicalIntervals>

children.label: GeographicalInterval
children.description: Geografisk intervall (prisband) — definerer en avstandskategori med tilhørende pris. Brukes sammen med PriceGroup og GeographicalIntervalPrice. Typisk bruk: Band A for korte distanser, Band B for mellom, Band C for lange.
children.xmlSnippet:
<GeographicalInterval version="1.0" id="UK:GI:BandA:LOC">
  <Name>Price Band A</Name>
  <Description>Short distance - up to 5 stops</Description>
  <NumberOfUnits>1</NumberOfUnits>
</GeographicalInterval>

children.label: qualityStructureFactors
children.description: Kvalitetsfaktorer for klippekort/carnet. Definerer antall reiser i en multi-trip pakke (f.eks. 5, 10 eller 25 reiser). Brukes med AmountOfPriceUnitProduct.
children.xmlSnippet:
<qualityStructureFactors>
  <QualityStructureFactor version="1.0" id="UK:QSF:10trips:LOC">
    <Name>10 trip carnet</Name>
    <Value>10</Value>
  </QualityStructureFactor>
</qualityStructureFactors>

children.label: QualityStructureFactor
children.description: Kvalitetsfaktor — angir antall enheter i et klippekort eller carnet. Value angir antallet (f.eks. 5, 10, 25 reiser). Brukes i Tariff/qualityStructureFactors og refereres av AmountOfPriceUnitProduct.
children.xmlSnippet:
<QualityStructureFactor version="1.0" id="UK:QSF:10trips:LOC">
  <Name>10 trip carnet</Name>
  <Description>Book of 10 single journeys</Description>
  <Value>10</Value>
</QualityStructureFactor>

children.label: fareProducts
children.description: Takstprodukter — definerer billetter og pass som kan kjøpes. UK-profilen bruker hovedsakelig PreassignedFareProduct (forhåndsdefinert produkt som enkeltbillett eller dagskort) og AmountOfPriceUnitProduct (klippekort/carnet). Hvert produkt refererer til FareStructureElement(er) via validableElements.
children.xmlSnippet:
<fareProducts>
  <PreassignedFareProduct version="1.0" id="UK:PFP:Single:LOC">
    <Name>Single Ticket</Name>
    <validableElements>
      <ValidableElementRef ref="UK:VE:Single:LOC"/>
    </validableElements>
    <accessRightsInProduct>
      <AccessRightInProduct version="1.0" id="UK:ARIP:Single:LOC" order="1">
        <ValidableElementRef ref="UK:VE:Single:LOC"/>
      </AccessRightInProduct>
    </accessRightsInProduct>
  </PreassignedFareProduct>
</fareProducts>

children.label: PreassignedFareProduct
children.description: Forhåndsdefinert takstprodukt — representerer en billett eller et pass (enkeltbillett, dagskort, ukeskort osv.). Kobles til FareStructureElement via ValidableElement. accessRightsInProduct angir hvilke tilgangsrettigheter produktet gir. ConditionSummary beskriver betingelser (refunderbar, kan byttes, etc.).
children.xmlSnippet:
<PreassignedFareProduct version="1.0" id="UK:PFP:DayPass:LOC">
  <Name>Day Pass</Name>
  <Description>Unlimited travel for one day</Description>
  <ConditionSummary>
    <CanBreakJourney>true</CanBreakJourney>
    <IsRefundable>false</IsRefundable>
  </ConditionSummary>
  <validableElements>
    <ValidableElementRef ref="UK:VE:DayPass:LOC"/>
  </validableElements>
  <accessRightsInProduct>
    <AccessRightInProduct version="1.0"
      id="UK:ARIP:DayPass:LOC" order="1">
      <ValidableElementRef ref="UK:VE:DayPass:LOC"/>
    </AccessRightInProduct>
  </accessRightsInProduct>
  <ProductType>dayPass</ProductType>
</PreassignedFareProduct>

children.label: AmountOfPriceUnitProduct
children.description: Klippekort/carnet-produkt — representerer et forhåndsbetalt kort med flere reiser. Antall reiser angis via QualityStructureFactor. Typisk bruk: 5-reisekort, 10-reisekort osv.
children.xmlSnippet:
<AmountOfPriceUnitProduct version="1.0" id="UK:APUP:Carnet10:LOC">
  <Name>10 Trip Carnet</Name>
  <Description>Book of 10 single journeys</Description>
  <validableElements>
    <ValidableElementRef ref="UK:VE:CarnetTrip:LOC"/>
  </validableElements>
  <accessRightsInProduct>
    <AccessRightInProduct version="1.0"
      id="UK:ARIP:Carnet:LOC" order="1">
      <ValidableElementRef ref="UK:VE:CarnetTrip:LOC"/>
    </AccessRightInProduct>
  </accessRightsInProduct>
</AmountOfPriceUnitProduct>

children.label: salesOfferPackages
children.description: Salgstilbud — definerer hvordan produkter selges til kunder. SalesOfferPackage kobler FareProduct med TypeOfTravelDocument (billettmedium) og DistributionChannel (salgskanal). UK-profilen bruker ofte én SalesOfferPackage per kombinasjon av produkt og medium (f.eks. enkeltbillett på papir, enkeltbillett på app).
children.xmlSnippet:
<salesOfferPackages>
  <SalesOfferPackage version="1.0" id="UK:SOP:Single_Paper:LOC">
    <Name>Single - Paper Ticket</Name>
    <distributionAssignments>
      <DistributionAssignment version="1.0"
        id="UK:DA:OnBoard:LOC" order="1">
        <DistributionChannelType>onBoard</DistributionChannelType>
        <PaymentMethods>cash</PaymentMethods>
      </DistributionAssignment>
    </distributionAssignments>
    <salesOfferPackageElements>
      <SalesOfferPackageElement version="1.0"
        id="UK:SOPE:Single_Paper:LOC" order="1">
        <TypeOfTravelDocumentRef ref="UK:TTD:Paper:LOC"/>
        <PreassignedFareProductRef ref="UK:PFP:Single:LOC"/>
      </SalesOfferPackageElement>
    </salesOfferPackageElements>
  </SalesOfferPackage>
</salesOfferPackages>

children.label: SalesOfferPackage
children.description: Salgstilbud — definerer et salgbart produkt med medium og distribusjonskanaler. distributionAssignments angir hvor produktet kan kjøpes (ombord, app, automat, etc.) og betalingsmetoder. salesOfferPackageElements kobler FareProduct med TypeOfTravelDocument. UK-profilen bruker TypeOfSalesOfferPackageRef for kategorisering (f.eks. standard_product@operator).
children.xmlSnippet:
<SalesOfferPackage version="1.0" id="UK:SOP:DayPass_MobileApp:LOC">
  <Name>Day Pass - Mobile App</Name>
  <Description>Day pass purchased via mobile app</Description>
  <TypeOfSalesOfferPackageRef version="fxc:v1.0"
    ref="fxc:standard_product@operator"/>
  <!-- Distribusjonskanaler: -->
  <distributionAssignments>
    <DistributionAssignment version="1.0"
      id="UK:DA:App:LOC" order="1">
      <DistributionChannelType>mobileDevice</DistributionChannelType>
      <PaymentMethods>mobilePhone creditCard</PaymentMethods>
      <DistributionRights>sale</DistributionRights>
    </DistributionAssignment>
  </distributionAssignments>
  <!-- Produktelementer: -->
  <salesOfferPackageElements>
    <SalesOfferPackageElement version="1.0"
      id="UK:SOPE:DayPass_App:LOC" order="1">
      <TypeOfTravelDocumentRef ref="UK:TTD:MobileApp:LOC"/>
      <PreassignedFareProductRef ref="UK:PFP:DayPass:LOC"/>
    </SalesOfferPackageElement>
  </salesOfferPackageElements>
</SalesOfferPackage>

children.label: fareTables
children.description: Pristabeller — inneholder faktiske priser. UK-profilen bruker FareTable med columns (fra-soner) og rows (til-soner), og Cell for hver pris. Alternativt kan FareTable inneholde en flat liste av celler uten columns/rows. Hvert FareTable knytter sammen SalesOfferPackage, FareProduct og priser.
children.xmlSnippet:
<fareTables>
  <FareTable version="1.0" id="UK:FT:Single_Adult:LOC">
    <Name>Single Fares - Adult</Name>
    <pricesFor>
      <PreassignedFareProductRef ref="UK:PFP:Single:LOC"/>
      <SalesOfferPackageRef ref="UK:SOP:Single_Paper:LOC"/>
    </pricesFor>
    <!-- Columns og Rows (matrise-struktur): -->
    <columns>
      <FareTableColumn version="1.0"
        id="UK:FTC:ZoneA:LOC" order="1">
        <representing>
          <TariffZoneRef ref="UK:TZ:ZoneA:LOC"/>
        </representing>
      </FareTableColumn>
    </columns>
    <rows>
      <FareTableRow version="1.0"
        id="UK:FTR:ZoneB:LOC" order="1">
        <representing>
          <TariffZoneRef ref="UK:TZ:ZoneB:LOC"/>
        </representing>
      </FareTableRow>
    </rows>
    <!-- Priser i celler: -->
    <cells>
      <Cell version="1.0" id="UK:C:A_to_B:LOC" order="1">
        <DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0"
          id="UK:DMEP:A_to_B_Adult:LOC">
          <Amount>2.40</Amount>
        </DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
        <ColumnRef ref="UK:FTC:ZoneA:LOC"/>
        <RowRef ref="UK:FTR:ZoneB:LOC"/>
      </Cell>
    </cells>
  </FareTable>
</fareTables>

children.label: FareTable
children.description: Pristabell — inneholder priser for en kombinasjon av FareProduct og SalesOfferPackage. pricesFor angir hvilke produkter tabellen gjelder for. UK-profilen bruker to strukturer: (1) Matrise med columns/rows/cells for OD-priser, eller (2) Flat liste av cells for pass-priser. Columns og rows representerer soner eller brukerprofiler. Cell inneholder DistanceMatrixElementPrice eller TimeIntervalPrice.
children.xmlSnippet:
<!-- OD-pristabell (matrise): -->
<FareTable version="1.0" id="UK:FT:Single_Adult_Line1:LOC">
  <Name>Single Fares - Adult - Line 1</Name>
  <pricesFor>
    <PreassignedFareProductRef ref="UK:PFP:Single:LOC"/>
    <SalesOfferPackageRef ref="UK:SOP:Single_Paper:LOC"/>
  </pricesFor>
  <!-- Kolonner (fra-soner): -->
  <columns>
    <FareTableColumn version="1.0"
      id="UK:FTC:ZoneA:LOC" order="1">
      <Name>From Zone A</Name>
      <representing>
        <TariffZoneRef ref="UK:TZ:ZoneA:LOC"/>
      </representing>
    </FareTableColumn>
  </columns>
  <!-- Rader (til-soner): -->
  <rows>
    <FareTableRow version="1.0"
      id="UK:FTR:ZoneB:LOC" order="1">
      <Name>To Zone B</Name>
      <representing>
        <TariffZoneRef ref="UK:TZ:ZoneB:LOC"/>
      </representing>
    </FareTableRow>
  </rows>
  <!-- Prisceller: -->
  <cells>
    <Cell version="1.0" id="UK:C:A_to_B:LOC" order="1">
      <DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0"
        id="UK:DMEP:A_to_B_Adult:LOC">
        <!-- Referanse til prisband (GeographicalIntervalPrice): -->
        <GeographicalIntervalPriceRef ref="UK:GIP:BandB:LOC"/>
        <!-- Eller direkte pris: -->
        <!-- <Amount>2.40</Amount> -->
        <DistanceMatrixElementRef ref="UK:DME:A_to_B:LOC"/>
      </DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
      <ColumnRef ref="UK:FTC:ZoneA:LOC"/>
      <RowRef ref="UK:FTR:ZoneB:LOC"/>
    </Cell>
  </cells>
</FareTable>

<!-- Pass-pristabell (flat liste): -->
<FareTable version="1.0" id="UK:FT:WeekPass_Prices:LOC">
  <Name>Week Pass Prices</Name>
  <pricesFor>
    <PreassignedFareProductRef ref="UK:PFP:WeekPass:LOC"/>
    <SalesOfferPackageRef ref="UK:SOP:WeekPass:LOC"/>
  </pricesFor>
  <cells>
    <Cell version="1.0" id="UK:C:Week_Adult:LOC" order="1">
      <SalesOfferPackagePrice version="1.0"
        id="UK:SOPP:Week_Adult:LOC">
        <Amount>16.00</Amount>
      </SalesOfferPackagePrice>
      <!-- Brukerprofil: -->
      <noticeAssignments>
        <NoticeAssignmentView>
          <Text>Adult 7-day pass</Text>
        </NoticeAssignmentView>
      </noticeAssignments>
    </Cell>
  </cells>
</FareTable>

children.label: priceGroups
children.description: Prisgrupper — samler GeographicalIntervalPrice for prisband. Brukes for å gruppere priser som gjelder for flere OD-relasjoner. Typisk bruk: Band A = £1.60, Band B = £2.40. DistanceMatrixElement refererer til PriceGroup i stedet for å angi pris direkte.
children.xmlSnippet:
<priceGroups>
  <PriceGroup version="1.0" id="UK:PG:BandA:LOC">
    <Name>Price Band A</Name>
    <members>
      <GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0"
        id="UK:GIP:BandA_Adult:LOC">
        <Amount>1.60</Amount>
      </GeographicalIntervalPrice>
      <GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0"
        id="UK:GIP:BandA_Child:LOC">
        <Amount>0.80</Amount>
        <!-- Viser at barnepris er avledet fra voksenpris: -->
        <GeographicalIntervalPriceRef ref="UK:GIP:BandA_Adult:LOC"/>
        <DiscountingRuleRef ref="UK:DR:HalfPrice:LOC"/>
      </GeographicalIntervalPrice>
    </members>
  </PriceGroup>
</priceGroups>

children.label: PriceGroup
children.description: Prisgruppe — samler flere GeographicalIntervalPrice som tilhører samme prisband. Typisk én pris per brukerprofil (voksen, barn) i hver gruppe. DistanceMatrixElement refererer til PriceGroup for å angi hvilket prisband som gjelder.
children.xmlSnippet:
<PriceGroup version="1.0" id="UK:PG:BandB:LOC">
  <Name>Price Band B - Medium distance</Name>
  <members>
    <!-- Voksenpris: -->
    <GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0"
      id="UK:GIP:BandB_Adult:LOC">
      <Amount>2.40</Amount>
    </GeographicalIntervalPrice>
    <!-- Barnepris (avledet fra voksen): -->
    <GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0"
      id="UK:GIP:BandB_Child:LOC">
      <Amount>1.20</Amount>
      <GeographicalIntervalPriceRef ref="UK:GIP:BandB_Adult:LOC"/>
      <DiscountingRuleRef ref="UK:DR:HalfPrice:LOC"/>
    </GeographicalIntervalPrice>
  </members>
</PriceGroup>
